business_ideas.idea: Acquire underperforming software companies and grow them to profitability via aggressive SEO and features
Free product with premium tier monetization: build 99% free, charge on 1% of high-value features
D2C brand roll-up: buy e-commerce shops at low multiples post-COVID, fix operations and grow revenue
Minority-owned business setup: use MBE certification to win government contracts, white-label to larger firms

predictions.text: E-commerce multiples will compress from COVID highs, creating acquisition opportunities for operators
Free software products can reach 40M+ visitors and cash-flow millions monthly with smart monetization layer
